user_query: I'm planning a trip to Boston next summer and want to explore the city's basketball history. Can you provide me with the roster and schedule for the Boston Celtics in the year 2008? Additionally, I'd like to see some images of the team to get a better sense of their identity.

TaskList.description: Retrieve the 2008 roster for the Boston Celtics.
Retrieve the 2008 schedule for the Boston Celtics.
Fetch images of the Boston Celtics team from 2008.
